figures.caption: Fig. 1. Overview of the study design. Fifty pairs of Dutch thorax/abdomen radiology reports were analyzed using the llm_extractinator package [5], configured with tailored prompts and a customized output parser. The generated structured JSON outputs, representing all lesions extracted from each report pair, were manually assessed for quality by two independent readers.

Fig. 2. Comparison of LLM extraction accuracy across lesion types: Target Lesions (TL), NonTarget Lesions (NTL), and New Lesions (NL). Accuracy is shown at three levels: document (green), lesion (orange), and attribute (blue).
